美国权力网络 | 原文 Telegraph

写这篇文章是看完硅谷101的硅谷右翼权力网络，学到非常多，所以想重新梳理下美国权力网络。 "左翼 vs 右翼"这个二元框架在 2024-2026 已经在解体。但还是让我们复盘下过去的角逐： 结论：从"存量"看，左翼网络仍然更大…

title: 别再无脑装豆包了，实测五款国产 AI App，最强的竟是...
content: A review compared five Chinese AI apps: Doubao, Yuanbao, Kimi, Qianwen, and DeepSeek. DeepSeek excelled at writing and document summarization. Doubao led in AI photo editing and visual recognition via video calls. Kimi performed best as a search engine. Qianwen integrated Alibaba services for shopping and tasks. Yuanbao connected to WeChat but offered weaker integration. The author ranked DeepSeek first overall for text quality, followed by Doubao, Qianwen, Kimi, and Yuanbao, noting core model capability ultimately determines user experience.

title: LWiAI Podcast #246 - Gemini 3.5 + Omni, Musk Loses, OpenAI vs Erdős
content: Google I/O featured Gemini 3.5, the Spark agent, and Omni video generation. Other topics include coding agents from Cursor and xAI, Elon Musk losing his OpenAI lawsuit, Anthropic's $30 billion funding at a $900 billion valuation, and Cerebras' 90% IPO surge. Research coverage spans OpenAI solving an 80-year-old Erdős geometry problem, negation neglect and redundant circuits in models, autonomous hacking and self-replication risks, deepfake enforcement, and image provenance metadata.
source: Last Week in AI - Last Week in AI

title: 前端初级岗位暴跌62%：我带了三年的实习生被裁了，而AI是他亲手教的
content: Junior frontend positions have declined 62% year-over-year as AI tools now handle entry-level coding tasks. Companies increasingly hire senior developers who use AI to replace multiple junior roles, raising industry entry barriers from basic coding to architecture and complex problem-solving. While demand for advanced frontend engineers remains strong with rising salaries, traditional junior growth paths are vanishing. The field is shifting toward AI engineering and automation roles, requiring developers to evolve beyond routine implementation work.

title: 抵制活动冲击营收，星巴克韩国高管致歉
content: Starbucks Korea executives issued an apology after a boycott campaign began affecting the company’s revenue. The boycott has reportedly impacted the brand’s earnings in the Korean market. The executives acknowledged the situation and expressed regret over the financial consequences stemming from the consumer backlash.

title: 脉脉创始人兼 CEO：具身智能岗位平均月薪约 6.2 万元
content: Embodied AI is a new talent hotspot. From January to April 2026, job postings in the field grew 15‑fold, with an average monthly salary of about 62,000 yuan. In the same period, new‑economy roles expanded 22.6 %, AI positions increased 8.7‑fold, and AI’s share of all new roles rose from 2.78 % to 22.03 %. Although funding is strong, embodied‑AI firms cannot match large‑model companies in pay, because those companies invest heavily in compute and attract top researchers who can generate billions in value. Fear of missing out is driving tech firms to accelerate their embodied‑AI initiatives.
eventKey: 脉脉创始人兼-ceo-具身智能岗位平均月薪约
normalizedTitle: 脉脉创始人兼 ceo 具身智能岗位平均月薪约 6 2 万元
